Author: Aschy
Name: Market Master Pro
Punchline: Manual market intelligence and arbitrage scanner for FFXIV.
Description: Analyzes market opportunities with Universalis data, watchlists, velocity filters, and manual undercut helpers. All actions are manual. Now includes real-time undercut notifications.
Changelog:
v1.1.36: Installer reliability hotfix - release asset now uses a versioned filename to avoid stale CDN cache and ensure distributed package version matches feed version.
v1.1.35: Reissued release package on a fresh tag to bypass stale CDN artifact and restore install/update reliability for latest opportunities persistence update.
v1.1.34: Scanner now persists the most recent opportunities and keeps them visible until a new scan completes; latest opportunity snapshot is restored on startup.
v1.1.33: Stability pass: opportunities table now supports row caps, compact mode, and optional detailed tooltips; exclusion inspector now uses TTL caching with refresh debounce; added pluginmaster feed validation script for safer releases.

Author: Aschy
Name: Armoury Cleaner
Punchline: Filter and move unwanted gear out of your armoury chest.
Description: Define filters by job, minimum/maximum equip level, and item level. Armoury Cleaner scans each gear slot and moves only items that match all active filters into your inventory so you can discard them.
Changelog:
v1.0.9: New 'Skip Gearset Items' filter (default ON) ? items currently assigned to any saved gearset are excluded from the scan, so Discard All can never delete gear you actively use.
v1.0.8: Added /acplugin command for consistent access alongside /ac legacy alias.
v1.0.7: UI redesign ? removed Auto-Discard toggle; separate Move To Inventory and Discard All buttons; both now use random 800-1100ms delays for consistent pacing; direct discard from armoury is now the default for Discard All.
v1.0.6: Direct discard from armoury ? new option (under Auto-Discard) skips the move-to-inventory step and discards items straight from the armoury slot, with automatic fallback to move+discard if the game rejects it.
v1.0.5: Internal cleanup; repo renamed to AschyQOL.
v1.0.4: Discard All uses random 800-1100ms delay between items; Cancel Queue button.
v1.0.3: Auto-Discard mode via InventoryManager.DiscardItem.
v1.0.0: Initial release.

Author: Aschy
Name: QuestNav
Punchline: One-click teleport to the nearest aetheryte for each active quest.
Description: QuestNav lists all your active quests and adds a Teleport button next to each one. Clicking it teleports you to the nearest unlocked aetheryte to the quest's location ? no more hunting through the map.
Changelog:
v1.1.11: Full quest database access ? GetAllQuests() retrieves every quest with complete step information. AllSteps list includes step titles and NPC locations for navigation.
v1.1.10: Rewrote arrow direction using direct vector projection onto player's forward/right axes ? should now reliably point to the quest target.
v1.1.9: Smaller default window (360x160); wider action column; Flag/Unflag toggle button with tooltip; tooltips on all buttons.
v1.1.8: Fixed arrow direction formula.
v1.1.7: Major UI improvements ? compact row heights, single-line quest info, smaller window.
v1.1.6: Fixed arrow pointing wrong direction; event-driven quest refresh.
v1.1.5: UI redesign ? sleeker 2-column layout, collapsible settings.
v1.1.4: Fixed quest lookup with improved error handling.
v1.1.3: Arrow background opacity slider.
v1.1.2: Fix arrow overlay never appearing.
v1.1.1: Fix crash on unknown quest IDs.
v1.1.0: Arrow overlay, teleport cost, zone highlight, map flag, compact mode, auto-refresh.
v1.0.0: Initial release.

Author: Aschy
Name: Slidecaster
Punchline: Highlights the final safe-move window while casting.
Description: Adds a cast-bar overlay that marks the slidecasting timeframe so you can start moving without interrupting the cast. Includes an optional audio cue when the safe window begins.
Changelog:
v1.0.16: New default settings for overlay positioning and sizing; numeric input boxes for Overlay Opacity, Overlay Height Scale, and Safe Bar Height Scale.
v1.0.0: Initial release with cast-bar safe-zone overlay, configurable timing, and optional safe-move sound cue.

Author: Aschy
Name: BagAssistant
Punchline: Rule-based inventory sorter with comprehensive filters.
Description: Define a stack of sorting rules and BagAssistant will route items to the right bag every time. Filter by item category, rarity, level range, item level, class/job, HQ, tradeable, name match, vendor price, item ID and more.
Changelog: v1.0.0: Initial release. Rule list with vast filter set and per-rule destination bag.
